scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:rust" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:node: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build:rust && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.build:node: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix server && npm run typecheck --prefix client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix server && npm run lint --prefix client
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
